title: chenopodina maritima
intro: Chenopodina maritima, also known as sea purslane, is a succulent, perennial plant that grows in coastal areas, particularly in Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chenopodina maritima include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of sea purslane include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
